title: Ligation Independent Cloning of transporter gene into BacMam vector
author: David B. Sauer
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol is used to clone the gene of interest into a BacMam vector (pHTBV1.1 in this case) in a ligation-free manner, which can subsequently be used to transpose the gene of interest into a bacmid for transfecting insect cells.
steps_raw: This protocol is used to clone the gene of interest into a BacMam vector (pHTBV1.1 in this case) in a ligation-free manner, which can subsequently be used to transpose the gene of interest into a bacmid for transfecting insect cells.
